label: Skill need (base + bonus)
description: Evaluates to baseValue + bonusPerLevel × skill level. Private fields in source but XML-backed.

Class.label: Class
Class.description: C# SkillNeed subclass used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

required.label: Required
required.description: If true, the pawn must have this skill for the stat to be enabled.

baseValue.label: Base value
baseValue.description: Value applied at skill level 0. Private in source but loaded from XML. Default is 0.5.

bonusPerLevel.label: Bonus per level
bonusPerLevel.description: Additional value added per skill level. Private in source but loaded from XML. Default is 0.05.
